mapper.select: /* 설 명 : 금주강의조회 */ SELECT MIN(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MAX , MIN(LCTR_WKNO_SYMD) AS LESSON_START_DT_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO_EYMD) AS LESSON_END_DT_MAX FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN LCTR_WKNO_SYMD AND LCTR_WKNO_EYMD AND SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} GROUP BY SBJCT_ID

/* 설 명 : 주차별강의일정목록조회 - with 학습활동포함 */
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 0 FIRST_ORD, 0 SCND_ORD, A.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO SEQNO, '주차' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ID, A.LCTR_TTL NM FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL A WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 1 SCND_ORD, A.LCTR_SEQNO SEQNO, '강의' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_LCTR' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_ID ID, A.LCTRNM NM FROM TB_LMS_LCTR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 2 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '과제' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_ASMT' SRC_TBL, A.ASMT_ID ID, A.ASMT_TTL NM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 3 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '토론' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_DSCS' SRC_TBL, A.DSCS_ID ID, A.DSCS_TTL NM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 4 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '설문' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_SRVY' SRC_TBL, A.SRVY_ID ID, A.SRVY_TTL NM FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 5 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '세미나' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_SMNR' SRC_TBL, A.SMNR_ID ID, A.SMNRNM NM FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 6 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '시험' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC.' || EXAM_TYCD SRC_TBL, A.EXAM_BSC_ID ID, A.EXAM_TTL NM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{subjectId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WKNO001' LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 7 SCND_ORD, 0 SEQNO, '자료' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_BBS' SRC_TBL, 'DATARM_ID' ID, '자료이름' NM FROM DUAL A
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID , 2 FIRST_ORD, 7 SCND_ORD, 10000 SEQNO , 'LRN_DATA_ADD' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ID , '학습자료추가' NM FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL A WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID
ORDER BY LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, FIRST_ORD, SCND_ORD, SEQNO
